title: Visual QA Triage Matrix and Screenshot Handoff Kit
purpose: Prepare a consistent human visual QA flow after the UI redesign series, without changing runtime UI or application logic.
changes: Added a screen-by-screen visual QA triage matrix.
Added a screenshot naming and capture protocol.
Added a visual issue report template for fast fixes from screenshots.
Added a final UI review route map by page, viewport, theme, and priority.
recommended_first_screenshot: Settings > Telegram, light mode, 1366px width, full page capture plus top fold crop.
